canon_index_and_book_one_additions_2026_: 29. Kasey vs. KC vs. Casey — Kemi confirmed in chat 'Kasey is KC,' but UMADA_CANON_INDEX.md explicitly warns 'KC — not Casey.' Whether 'Kasey' is a safe informal expansion or risks the warned-against spelling is not resolved.

30. Is KC a fifth Cape Wipeout survivor? Book One timeline places KC 'separated' (not confirmed killed) at Cape Wipeout. KC is not added to the locked four-survivor sentence; whether KC should eventually count as a fifth survivor is open.
31. Chimera lineage assignment — Lion and Jaguar are locked as the first and second successful chimera lineages. Whether Tallai, Q, or Quartz belong to either lineage is not stated and not assumed.

32. Cindy/Cape Wipeout sequence conflict — the locked civilizational arc places Cindy after Cape Wipeout; two new 2026-06-25 sources place Cindy before the Cape Operation and Cape Wipeout. Neither account is altered; the conflict is flagged, not resolved.

33. Five Houses vs. the Era-15 faction list — three names plausibly correspond (Lion Kingdom/Lion House, Cybernetic Houses/Cybernetic House, Pure Human Communities/Pure Human House); Jaguar House and S-Vector House have no old predecessor; Black Stars and Phoenix Rising have no Houses counterpart. None asserted as fact.
34. Jackal Peoples vs. Jaguar House — near-homophone, explicitly not treated as the same entity pending Kemi's confirmation.
35. S-Vector House / Era 2 — S-Vector linkage — substantially clarifies the PROBABLE era but the link is inferred, not stated outright in either source.
